name: Mohammodullah Emran
summary: Software engineer with 4+ years building production backend services in C#/.NET and React/TypeScript. Strong in REST API design, microservices, SQL Server performance tuning, and Azure cloud services — recently migrated 80k+ user identities to Okta with zero data loss.

highlights: Design and maintain 6+ .NET Core microservices on Azure Service Bus and App Services, improving reliability by 25%.
Migrated 80k+ user identities from a legacy Sentry DB to Okta (.NET 10, Dapper, Polly) with zero data loss.
Tuned SQL Server indexing and stored procedures, cutting average query time by ~40% on high-traffic tables — see the war-story article.
Own production observability (New Relic, Application Insights, Seq), improving incident detection and triage.
Maintain Docker-based CI/CD in Azure DevOps, cutting deployment cycle from 45 to 30 minutes.
Developed RESTful APIs in ASP.NET Core for high-traffic web apps, improving page load times by 30%.
Built core modules of Altios, a workforce management platform serving 2,000+ users, cutting manual tasks by ~40%.
Integrated Dynamics 365 Business Central APIs for financial analytics with cross-functional teams in Agile sprints.
Led migration from legacy .NET Framework to .NET 8, cutting Azure hosting costs — see the war-story article.
Built "Alo-Bangla Screen Reader," a Windows tool that reads text aloud for visually impaired users, for the Government of Bangladesh under the ICT Ministry (C#, UI Automation, Win32 DLL).
Integrated custom IAccessible and Win32 DLL wrappers, raising accessibility compliance from 60% to 90%.

projects.name: LendR
highlights: Lending/borrowing tracker with dual transaction modes, built on Vertical Slice Architecture (FastEndpoints + MediatR).
Real-time SignalR notifications, pluggable multi-cloud storage (Oracle OCI / local), self-hosted VPS deployment.

projects.name: ClothStore
highlights: Full e-commerce platform with 4-role RBAC, dual-mode cart (guest + authenticated), and public order tracking.
Observability with Serilog + Seq + OpenTelemetry, PDF invoicing (QuestPDF), email (MailKit), xUnit tests.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science, Computer Science & Engineering
certificates: Full Stack Observability Practitioner (New Relic, Nov 2024)

skills: Azure (App Services, Functions, Service Bus, AKS)
